creator: chris.dukes.aix@gmail.com
text:
I'm building packages under poudriere and opting to enable documentation on all modules.

The following error occurs when attempting to install.
Checking integrity...pkg: WARNING: locally installed open-motif-2.3.3_2 conflicts on /usr/local/man/man3/Object.3.gz with:
	- tcl-8.5.12_2

Or or both packages probably need to rename this manpage.

How-To-Repeat: Using poudriere to build the ports, enable docs/manpages for both and attempt to install tcl85 after open-motif
